label: Organization
description: Company, nonprofit, manufacturer, clinic, or any organizational entity. Use when the report mentions a company, brand, or institution.

label: Person
description: Named individual — executive, founder, scientist, advisor, researcher. Use when the report names specific people with roles or credentials.

label: Product
description: Supplement, device, diagnostic, or service product. Use when the report lists products with names, ingredients, prices, or specs.

label: Compound
description: Chemical compound, molecule, or active ingredient. Use when the report discusses specific compounds, molecules, or chemical substances.

label: Study
description: Clinical trial, research study, or scientific investigation. Use when the report references studies with NCT IDs, trial phases, or research outcomes.

label: Biology
description: Biomarkers, conditions, mechanisms, pathways, and biological entities. Use when the report discusses biological processes, disease conditions, or biomarker measurements.

label: Diagnostics
description: Lab tests, diagnostic panels, biomarker panels, and measurement methods. Use when the report covers diagnostic products, test panels, or lab testing.
